skill.Thieving.name: Thieving
skill.Thieving.perk.level_3: Chance to get Universal Neutrals when pickpocketing.
skill.Thieving.perk.level_6: Chance to get Universal Likes when pickpocketing.
Thieving5a.name: Pickpocket
Thieving5a.desc: Direction does not affect pickpocketing chance
Thieving5b.name: Robin Hood
Thieving5b.desc: Chance to avoid friendship loss from thieving actions
Thieving10a1.name: Highwayman
Thieving10a1.desc: Can pickpocket from multiple people around you at once.
Thieving10a2.name: Mugger
Thieving10a2.desc: Gain Life and Stamina when you pickpocketing
Thieving10b1.name: Phantom
Thieving10b1.desc: Gain better rewards and leave fewer traces when thieving
Thieving10b2.name: Rogue
Thieving10b2.desc: Improves your chance of successful thieving actions.
moonslime.Thieving.Cooldown.apply: You can't steal for a bit after your last attempt.
moonslime.Thieving.Cooldown.on_cooldown: You can not pickpocket right now.
You can not pickpocket right for another 10 minutes.
You can not pickpocket right for another 20 minutes.
You can not pickpocket right for another 30 minutes.
You can not pickpocket right for another 40 minutes.
You can not pickpocket right for another 50 minutes.
You can not pickpocket right for another 60 minutes.
You can not pickpocket right for another 70 minutes.
You can not pickpocket right for another 80 minutes.
You can not pickpocket right for another 90 minutes.
You can not pickpocket right for another 100 minutes.
You can not pickpocket right for another 110 minutes.
You can not pickpocket right for another 120 minutes.
You can not pickpocket right for another 130 minutes.
You can not pickpocket right for another 140 minutes.
moonslime.Thieving.lockpick_needed: You can use lockpick on this door.
moonslime.Thieving.shoplifting.banned: You are not welcome here for {daysRemaining} more day(s).
moonslime.Thieving.shoplifting.cant_stea: You can't steal from this shop.
You can't steal from a catalogue.
moonslime.Thieving.shoplifting.put_down_: Put down the item you're holding first.
moonslime.Thieving.shoplifting.out_of_st: That item is out of stock.
moonslime.Thieving.shoplifting.cant_stea: You can't steal that right now.
moonslime.Thieving.shoplifting.no_value: That item has no value to steal.
moonslime.Thieving.shoplifting.not_enoug: You don't have enough gold to cover the value of the item if you get caught.
moonslime.Thieving.shoplifting.caught: You were caught shoplifting and paid {itemValue}g.
config.General.tooltip: General settings for the Thieving skill.
config.Pickpocketing.tooltip: Settings for stealing from villagers and monsters.
config.Lockpicking.tooltip: Settings for bypassing locked doors with lockpicks.
config.GeneralSettings.tooltip: General settings for the Thieving skill.
config.PickpocketingSettings.tooltip: Settings for stealing from villagers and monsters.
config.ShopliftingSettings.tooltip: Settings for shoplifting chance, bans, and value limits.
config.ShopliftingWitnesses.tooltip: Settings for NPC friendship penalties when caught shoplifting.
config.ThiefIcon.tooltip:
Changes the icon of the Thieving skill on the skill page.
THIS REQUIRES A RESTART TO WORK.
config.Key_Cast.tooltip: Press this key to steal from NPCs when near them, or hold it while clicking in a shop to shoplift.
config.MonstersOnly.tooltip: When enabled, you can only steal from monsters and can never steal from villagers.
config.ShortCoolDown.tooltip: When enabled, pickpocketing only has a 10-minute cooldown instead of a variable cooldown.
config.ExpMod.tooltip: Multiplies pickpocketing EXP gained from the options below.
config.ExpFromFail.tooltip: How much EXP you get from a failed pickpocketing attempt.
config.ExpLevel1.tooltip: How much EXP you get from a tier 1 pickpocketing success.
config.ExpLevel2.tooltip: How much EXP you get from a tier 2 pickpocketing success.
config.ExpLevel3.tooltip: How much EXP you get from a tier 3 pickpocketing success.
config.ExpLevel4.tooltip: How much EXP you get from a tier 4 pickpocketing success.
config.LockpickingExp.tooltip: How much EXP the player gets when they successfully use a lockpick.
config.LockpickingWitnessRadius.tooltip: How many tiles away NPCs can notice the player lockpicking.
How much friendship nearby NPCs lose when they witness the player lockpicking.
config.ShopliftGoldPerLevel.tooltip: How much internal item value each Thieving level safely covers before adding extra caught chance.
config.ShopliftingBaseCatchChance.toolti: The base chance to get caught before Thieving level, daily attempts, and item value are applied.
config.ShopliftingCatchChanceReductionPe: How much caught chance is reduced per Thieving level.
config.ShopliftingCatchChanceIncreasePer: Catch Chance Increase Per Attempt Today
How much caught chance is added for each shoplifting attempt already made today.
Catch Chance Increase Per Value Step Over Limit
How much caught chance is added for each item value step above the player's safe value limit.
config.ShopliftingBanDays.tooltip: How many days the player is banned from a shop after being caught shoplifting.
config.ShopliftingSuccessExp.tooltip: How much EXP the player gets when they successfully shoplift.
config.ShopliftingCaughtExp.tooltip: How much EXP the player gets when they are caught shoplifting.
config.ShopliftingWitnessRadius.tooltip: How many tiles away NPCs can witness the player getting caught shoplifting.
How much friendship nearby NPCs lose when they witness the player getting caught shoplifting.
config.ShopliftingShopOwnerFriendshipLos: How much friendship the shop owner loses when the player is caught shoplifting.
